title: STOP pretending AI doesn’t Affect You
summary: David Ondrej argues that AI already significantly affects people's lives and challenges viewers to stop denying or minimizing this impact. The piece emphasizes the present-day relevance of AI technology rather than treating it as a distant future concern.
writeup: David Ondrej argues that AI already shapes daily life and pushes back against the tendency to deny or downplay that impact. The central claim is that AI is a present-day force, not a distant future concern. The takeaway is a call to treat current AI as something that warrants attention now rather than dismissal.
